title: Symbolanthus macranthus
taxonomy: Symbolanthus macranthus is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is native to South America and is classified as a member of the genus Symbolanthus. The classification of Symbolanthus macranthus is further broken down into the family, genus, and species levels. At the family level, it is grouped with other plants like gentians and swallowworts. The plant's classification helps scientists understand its evolutionary relationships and place it within the broader plant kingdom.
